ch0357_10_suguri/0101_0701_01_10:
[Name:PlayerNickname ]! I was
wonderin’ when you’d get here!
ch0357_10_suguri/0101_0701_02_10:
Let’s battle today—same as always!
I wanna get even stronger!
ch0357_10_suguri/7101_0701_01_10:
This sygna suit was designed to look like
Furret. I love how we match!
ch0357_10_suguri/7101_0701_02_10:
When I battle wearing this, I get more fired
up than usual.
ch0357_10_suguri/7101_0701_03_10:
Just like when I tied my hair up, changing
one’s look really makes a difference!
ch0357_10_suguri/7102_0701_01_10:
Furret and I have been together since he
was a Sentret.
ch0357_10_suguri/7102_0701_02_10:
When I’m cold, he wraps me up in his fluffy
tail. It’s super warm!
ch0357_10_suguri/7103_0701_01_10:
Terastallizing is neat...but Mega Evolving
and Dynamaxing are REALLY cool. They have
a huge impact!
ch0357_10_suguri/7103_0701_02_10:
I wanna do more special training so I can
use ’em as soon as possible!
ch0357_10_suguri/7104_0701_01_10:
One time, when I had Furret with me,
a Johto Trainer came up to me.
ch0357_10_suguri/7104_0701_02_10:
They told me that while they were traveling
a long time ago, a Furret helped them out.
ch0357_10_suguri/7104_0701_03_10:
Furret are clever. They’re super reliable,
whether you’re adventuring or battling!
ch0357_10_suguri/7105_0701_01_10:
Hey, [Name:PlayerNickname ]. Y’know,
if you ever have a problem, you can rely
on me.
ch0357_10_suguri/7105_0701_02_10: It’s no good to struggle by yourself.
ch0357_10_suguri/7105_0701_03_10:
Promise me that when you need help,
you’ll rely on your friends. It doesn’t
have to be me!
ch0357_10_suguri/1701_0701_01_10: Oh, here you are. Take this!
ch0357_10_suguri/1701_0702_01_10: Ehehe... I was saving it for you.
ch0357_10_suguri/2501_0701_01_10:
When a designer here on Pasio gave me this
sygna suit, I was so surprised!
ch0357_10_suguri/2501_0701_02_10:
They say a sygna suit is proof of your bond
with your Pokémon.
ch0357_10_suguri/2501_0701_03_10:
That means someone saw me and Furret and
could tell we’re good friends.
ch0357_10_suguri/2501_0701_04_10: Ehehe... Thinkin’ about it makes me happy!
ch0357_10_suguri/2501_0702_01_10:
I hope I can get sygna suits with my other
Pokémon, too.
ch0357_10_suguri/2501_0702_02_10:
I love all my Pokémon—they’re all special
to me!
ch0357_10_suguri/2511_0701_01_10:
I’ve been with Furret a long time, but there
was a time I didn’t battle with him.
ch0357_10_suguri/2511_0701_02_10:
I was obsessed with winning... I guess I put
a lot of pressure on myself.
ch0357_10_suguri/2511_0701_03_10:
But now I’m better at bringing out Furret’s
strengths, and we have tons of fun!
ch0357_10_suguri/2511_0702_01_10:
Here on Pasio, I feel like I can find lots of
ways to win with Furret.
ch0357_10_suguri/2511_0702_02_10:
If you’ve any ideas, let me know,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]!
ch0357_10_suguri/3001_0701_01_10:
I woke up early and was thinking of taking
a walk. Wanna come?
ch0357_10_suguri/3003_0701_01_10:
Um... There’s a spot I wanted to see,
but I’m not used to using smartphones...
Could you show me around?
ch0357_10_suguri/3005_0701_01_10:
The sun’s going down, but we can still hang
out a little longer!
